name: claude-config
description: Linlin's curated Claude Code configuration: workflow rules, skills, hooks, plugin recommendations, tooling preferences, and project templates. Install once, then run /init-claude-config in any new project to scaffold it with the relevant subset.
_notes: This manifest follows the conventions emerging in the Claude Code plugin ecosystem (mattpocock/skills, anthropics/claude-plugins-official). The exact field names may need adjustment as the plugin spec stabilizes — see https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins for the canonical reference.

When the spec stabilizes, this file may need: a 'commands' array for slash-command overrides, an 'mcpServers' array if any MCP servers are bundled (currently none), a 'lspServers' array (currently none), or a 'manifestVersion' field.
